records.name: Product-bound support pad
records.summary: Apply a discrete support pad at a verified stable product region and assign its datum, auxiliary, or clamp-reaction role explicitly.
limitations: contact suitability and height require project geometry

reject_when: support is under an unstable or forbidden region
clamp load has no reaction path

provenance.usage_note: Public-source metadata and original FXD wording; not component geometry or manufacturing authority.

records.name: Round locator pin
records.summary: Use a round pin only where verified hole geometry, fit intent, insertion direction, wear, and controlled degrees of freedom are explicit.
limitations: diameter, fit, bushing, and tolerance are project-specific

reject_when: two round pins redundantly constrain variation

provenance.usage_note: Public-source metadata and original FXD wording; not component geometry or manufacturing authority.

records.name: Relieved or directional locator
records.summary: Use a relieved contact to control the intended direction while allowing variation or thermal movement in the orthogonal direction.
applicability: secondary location with known variation direction
limitations: relief orientation and contact width require deterministic evidence

provenance.usage_note: Public-source metadata and original FXD wording; not component geometry or manufacturing authority.

records.name: Replaceable hard stop
records.summary: Apply a stop against a verified product feature with clear approach, seating, unload, adjustment, and wear-replacement behavior.
limitations: a stop is not automatically a clamp or support

provenance.usage_note: Public-source metadata and original FXD wording; not component geometry or manufacturing authority.

records.name: Serviceable rest button
records.summary: Use a compact rest button when a small serviceable contact is preferable to a broad contour-matched support.
limitations: contact stress and surface marking require review

reject_when: contact area is insufficient or damages the product

provenance.usage_note: Public-source metadata and original FXD wording; not component geometry or manufacturing authority.

records.name: Laser-cut tab-and-slot riser
records.summary: Use a plate riser with explicit material, thickness, slot partner, engagement, clearance, insertion direction, weld relief, and sequence.
limitations: shop process allowances must be supplied and retained

engineering_details.validation_boundary: Project-specific material, process, fit, and assembly evidence remains mandatory.

provenance.usage_note: Public-source metadata and original FXD wording; not component geometry or manufacturing authority.

records.name: Clamp bracket with reaction evidence
records.summary: A clamp bracket binds the commercial clamp mounting interface to the fixture structure and records the product contact and reaction path separately.
applicability: manual, pneumatic, or hydraulic clamp mounting
limitations: bracket geometry does not validate the selected clamp or fixture strength

provenance.usage_note: Public-source metadata and original FXD wording; not component geometry or manufacturing authority.

records.name: Access-aware gusset
records.summary: Use a gusset only where it connects named parents and stays clear of product loading, tools, welds, inspection, and service corridors.
limitations: presence of a gusset does not establish structural adequacy

provenance.usage_note: Public-source metadata and original FXD wording; not component geometry or manufacturing authority.

records.name: Mounted base rail
records.summary: A base rail carries explicit section, end, parent, mounting, connection, and service interfaces rather than serving as an unqualified visual spine.
limitations: stock availability and section selection are shop and project inputs

provenance.usage_note: Public-source metadata and original FXD wording; not component geometry or manufacturing authority.

records.name: Fixture baseplate
records.summary: A baseplate records material, thickness, profile, mounting, lifting, drainage or cleaning, datum, and downstream DXF participation.
limitations: thickness and flatness are not universal defaults

reject_when: profile conflicts with loading or machine envelope

provenance.usage_note: Public-source metadata and original FXD wording; not component geometry or manufacturing authority.

records.name: Replaceable mounting foot
records.summary: Use a mounting foot to expose table contact, fastener, leveling, replacement, and maintenance interfaces independently of the main frame.
limitations: anchoring and load suitability require qualified review

reject_when: foot floats without a mating definition

provenance.usage_note: Public-source metadata and original FXD wording; not component geometry or manufacturing authority.

records.name: Removable bridge member
records.summary: A bridge member spans structure only when its installation, removal, process access, product release, and connected interfaces are explicit.
applicability: fixtures needing overhead or cross-frame support
limitations: bridge removal can create stale alignment and validation evidence

provenance.usage_note: Public-source metadata and original FXD wording; not component geometry or manufacturing authority.

records.name: Shimmed locator block
records.summary: A locator block records its datum contact, pinned or keyed parent interface, shim stack, adjustment limits, and prove-out state.
limitations: shim values and fit require measurement

provenance.usage_note: Public-source metadata and original FXD wording; not component geometry or manufacturing authority.

records.name: Generic review clamp envelope
records.summary: Represent an unresolved commercial clamp with clearly provisional body, handle, arm, and open-closed envelopes plus a metadata-only mounting intent.
applicability: concept review before exact tooling selection
limitations: excluded from exact collision, BOM part identity, STEP release, and manufacturing claims

reject_when: shown or exported as exact supplier geometry

provenance.usage_note: Public-source metadata and original FXD wording; not component geometry or manufacturing authority.

records.name: Wear and shim pack
records.summary: Track wear plates and shim packs as individually revisioned BOM items with installed state, service access, and measurement provenance.
limitations: installed thickness must be measured or explicitly assumed

reject_when: stack is omitted from geometry or BOM evidence

provenance.usage_note: Public-source metadata and original FXD wording; not component geometry or manufacturing authority.

records.name: User-authored clamp stand
records.summary: A reusable clamp stand preserves its authored feature history, table or frame mount, commercial clamp mount, access envelope, and replacement classes.
limitations: private geometry and shop dimensions remain outside the public repository

reject_when: private source is embedded in public data

provenance.usage_note: Public-source metadata and original FXD wording; not component geometry or manufacturing authority.

records.name: User-authored locator tower
records.summary: A reusable locator tower separates its base mount, vertical structure, replaceable locator interface, adjustment range, and product contact evidence.
limitations: placement and datum suitability do not transfer across projects

reject_when: tower revision silently changes an existing project

provenance.usage_note: Public-source metadata and original FXD wording; not component geometry or manufacturing authority.

records.name: User-authored removable nest
records.summary: A removable nest packages stable base mounting, product contacts, orientation cues, lifting or handling, and changeover validation triggers.
limitations: product-specific contacts may prevent reuse without explicit migration

reject_when: wrong nest can be installed without detection

provenance.usage_note: Public-source metadata and original FXD wording; not component geometry or manufacturing authority.

records.name: Metadata-only commercial component
records.summary: Store supplier, model, sourcing link, interface intent, and engineer confirmation without inventing or redistributing exact geometry.
limitations: excluded from exact collision, STEP, DXF, and release geometry

reject_when: metadata is treated as an exact interface without confirmation

provenance.usage_note: Public-source metadata and original FXD wording; not component geometry or manufacturing authority.

records.name: Supplier-authorized exact tooling
records.summary: Use exact supplier geometry only when the source, license, revision, SHA-256, storage policy, and permitted outputs are recorded and honored.
limitations: supplier authorization does not prove application suitability or permit public redistribution

reject_when: file is proposed for public commit

provenance.usage_note: Public-source metadata and original FXD wording; not component geometry or manufacturing authority.
